titleStmt.title: SII 37.39: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 39. (A.R. No. 341 of 1938-39.) Chintakommudinne, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up near the dhvaja-staṁbha in front of the Janārdanasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1453, Khara, Phālguṇa ba. 11, Saturday corresponding to 1532 A.D., March 11.

It records the gift of 90 rūkas, the amount being the grāma-kaṭnam tax of the village Chintakommudinne included in the Vūṭukūru-ṭhāṇe, to the god Kōnēṭi Tiruveṅgaḷappa of Vūṭukūru by Tirumalayya, son of Vīramarāju, for the daily offerings of the god for the merit of his parents and Sāḷvāka Narasappayya. The latter is said to have held the pārupatyam over the Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma, which was given as nāyaṅkara to Ayyaparasayya by the king, and to have leased out to the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrī jayābhyudayaśāli vā
hanahana śakavaruṣaṁbbulu 1453 Agunē
ṭi khara saṁvatsara phālguṇaba 11 śa . śrī madrā
jādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa
Acyuta dēva mahārāyalu vijayanagara
maṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai sāmrārājyaṁ
sēyucunnuṁḍḍaṁgānu dēvādi dēvuṁḍai
na guttirāju vūṭukūri Aṁdunuprasannamai
na kōnēṭi tiruveṁgalappiniki śrīvatsagōtraṁ Āsve
lāyana sūtraṁ ruku śākhādhyayulaina śrī
ni vīrama rājuṁgāri kumāḷḷu cina
tirumalayyaṁgāru Anaṁttālaina daṁḍḍamulu
sami¨rpiṁci Iccina dha¨rmaśāsanakrama meṭla
nnanu Acyuta dēvamahārāyalu Ayyaparu
sayyavāri nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁccina ghaṁḍikō
ṭa sīma sāḷvāka narusappayyaṁgāru patyaṁ śēyucu
nnu māku guttaku pāliṁcina kaḍapasīmavubhaya
mā¨rga suṁkhānaku jellēvūṭukūri ṭhāṇeṁlōnu ci
ṁtta kommudinnagrāmakaṭṭaṁ 90 Akṣarālā to
ṁbhai rūkalunnu śrī dēvādidēvuṁḍaina vuṭukū
rasuprasannamaina kōnēṭappani dadhyānnaṁ prātaḥ ḥkyāla
maṁdu dadyānnaṁ Avasaraṁ Āragiṁccē Aṭṭugānu
dhāravōśi Ayyaparusayyavārikinni ṣāśvā
ka narasappayyavārikinni mā talli taṁḍṛ
lakunnu puṇyaṁgānu sami¨rpaṁstimigānu
Ā caṁdra¨rkkasthāyigānu
dēvuṁḍu Avadhariṁppaṁgalavāṁḍlani Icci
na dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ . Idha¨rmānaku yavvaṁḍu
tappinānu tama talli taṁḍṟlanunnutama
guruvulanunnu kāsilōpala vadhiṁccina pā
pānaṁbōvuvāru gōṁbrāṁhmala vadhasē
sina pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru svadattādvigu
ṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . parada
ttāpahārēṇa svadattāṁ niṣpalaṁbbhavē
t . svadattāṁ paradattāṁvāyōharēti
vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhi[¨rva¨rṣa]sahasrāṇiviṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatēkrimiḥ . śrī maṁgaḷa ma
hā śrī śrī śrīṁjēyunu . timayyanaku
Digital edition of SII 37.39 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
